name: Prompt Director
description: Organize, version, and iterate on scene prompts. Provides a prompt library, full-fidelity editor with live playground, and inline storyboard strip for visual reference.

page_briefs.prompts: Scene prompt library with a filter bar at top providing text search, tag multi-select, scene-type chips, and version filter. Below, a dense sortable data table lists prompts with columns: title, tag chips, scene-type badge, token count, version number, last-edited relative time, and author avatar. Row click opens detail; hover reveals quick-duplicate and archive actions.
page_briefs.prompt-detail: Focused prompt editor view. Top region is a full-width prompt playground with large textarea featuring syntax-highlighted variables, parameter sidebar (model, temperature, seed), and a live preview panel streaming generated output with token count and latency. Below the editor, a horizontal scrollable storyboard strip displays reference scene thumbnails connected by thin narrative lines, letting the author see exactly which frames the prompt will drive.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area
